items.claim: Abdul Hussein is small for the 135-pound weight class at only 5'5".
items.quote: The only thing that I would say that could potentially be a negative for him at 135 pounds is this guy is small for this weight class. He's only 5'5, right?

items.claim: Abdul Hussein utilizes karate and taekwondo-esque light footwork, bouncing in and out of range and charging in with the backhand.
items.quote: Kind of karate taekwond doesque with the light footwork. Charges in with the backhand.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein secured a violent finish over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam six months ago.
items.quote: And his most recent victory 6 months ago was against a former UFC guy in Tyson Nam to where he violently uh put him away.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein had a competitive fight against Muhammad Mokaev earlier in their careers and was able to take Mokaev down.
items.quote: even though Hussein lost that fight, it was rather competitive at at moments, right? We saw Abdul taking down Muhammad Makay.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is nearly 39 years of age with a record of 21 and 12.
items.quote: while Cody Gibson's almost 39 years of age, you know, he's 21 and 12

items.claim: Cody Gibson was brutally starched in the first round by Ricky Leute eight months ago.
items.quote: going out there and getting brutally starched early in the fight by a Richie Long um in in the very first round eight months ago.

items.claim: Nuraly Aliev stands 5'10" with a 72-inch reach at 155 pounds.
Nuraly Aliev's striking has noticeably improved since entering the UFC.
items.quote: his striking, I feel like, has actually gotten a lot better since he's came into the UFC
